## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new hires and outline the onboarding process for GrowthX.ai employees](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Diverse team of 11 new hires from various global locations joining as content managers, managing editors, and other roles](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Week 1 focuses on company-wide onboarding: tool setup, reading company docs, watching videos, and completing workshops](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Content managers and managing editors have additional Week 2 tasks, including a simulation assignment due in \~10 days](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [Flexible work hours with emphasis on overlapping during Pacific morning times; unlimited PTO policy with 20-25 days/year guideline](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions

  - [11 new hires from locations including Nigeria, South Africa, Philippines, Croatia, Portugal, and the US](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Roles include content managers, managing editors, executive assistant, head of customer operations, and software engineer](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Brief personal introductions including weekend activities (e.g., beach visits, family time, recovery from illness)](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)

### Onboarding Program Overview

  - [Notion-based onboarding resources with corresponding Linear project management tasks](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [Day 1: Set up tools/accounts, attend this meeting, meet with manager/onboarding buddy](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Week 1: Extensive reading of company docs (e.g., big picture, how we work, HR policies)](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Watch company videos: Marcel's VC pitch, product overview](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Complete \~4 hours of workshop videos on GrowthX's core methodologies](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)

### HR Policies Highlights

  - [Unlimited PTO with 20-25 days/year guideline (excluding national holidays)](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [Flexible work hours, but aim to overlap during Pacific morning times (6am-12pm PT)](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
  - [Use calendar blocking to manage availability and communicate time off](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)

### Content Manager/Managing Editor Specific Onboarding

  - [Additional 2-week program including daily onboarding journal](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [Main component: Simulation assignment (pick a company, understand their model/voice, write editorial manifest and calibration article)](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [Assignment due in \~10 days, with subsequent feedback from Matthew (Chief Content Officer)](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
  - [Dedicated call with Matthew to explain assignment expectations (scheduled for next day)](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)

### Tools and Communication

  - [Linear for project/task management](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - [Notion for documentation and resources](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - Slack channels for communication (e.g., \#d-onboarding, \#tools-and-it)

## Next Steps

  - [Set up all required tools and accounts](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Begin reading company documentation in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Watch introductory videos (Marcel's pitch, product overview)](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Schedule meetings with manager and onboarding buddy](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Content managers/editors: Watch 7-minute simulation assignment video](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [Attend follow-up call about content manager simulation assignment (next day)](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
  - [Start working through Linear onboarding tasks](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Reach out to Bridget or Cristina with any questions or access issues](https://fathom.video/share/eJqCtA15TDyf_jfQHzjqNLK9NXvVJjSo?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
